info.name: economizai
info.description: API collection for the economizai backend (NFC-e collaborative price intelligence). Maintain in sync with every endpoint change. The 'E2E Flow' folder runs all requests in logical order — each request seeds data for the next.

item.name: E2E Flow
item.description: Sequential test suite — run top to bottom. Each step seeds variables (token, ids) for the next.
